chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-87 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objections No.1 to 3 a/w reply as at A 2. For hearing of main case 09.02.2026 Syed Ahmed Ali Shah, advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Mehran Khan, AAG Ms. Anum, APG a/w SIP/SHO Hanif Malik, PS Halani on behalf of SSP Naushahro Feroze and SIP Naseem Khan PS Shah Latif Town and Inspector Akhtar Aziz, PS Jamshed Quarters --------- SHO PS Halani is present and files statements on behalf of the respondent No.14 SSP District Nashahro Feroze and for himself and contends that no such FIR has been registered against the petitioners and statement has also been filed by SHO PS Jamshed Quarters. The petitioners present in person contend that they have been declared Karo Kari and will be murdered by their parents. SHO PS Halani submits that no such information has been received by him as alleged in the petition. Since, the petitioners have contracted marriage of their own freewill and apprehend danger to their their lives, their apprehension appears to be genuine. SHO PS Halani is directed to ensure that no harm is caused to the petitioners. He is further directed to call private respondents named in the petition and obtain undertaking from them that they will not cause any harm to the petitioners and their lives. In case, any harm is caused to the petitioners, SHO PS Halani may be held responsible for this act. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms alonwith pending application(s). Office to send a copy of this order to SSP Naushahro Feroze for information and compliance.
This petition stands disposed of in the above terms alonwith pending application(s). Office to send a copy of this order to SSP Naushahro Feroze for information and compliance. JUDGE Nadir*
